reason: Stage 3 needs OP/EPS/FCF and margin conversion, not K-food or K-beauty keywords.
US/Japan/Europe sales, Amazon/TikTok/Ulta/Sephora/Costco/Target, offline entry, ASP, and mainstream shelf drive Stage 2.
Shipment and listing are capped until sell-through, reorder, and repeat consumption are visible.
Inventory days, receivables days, gross margin, OPM, and discount rate decide whether growth is real.
60D/120D price path separates early Stage 3 catch from late 4B chasing.
Tariff, China exposure, recalls, product safety, and disclosure gaps cap Stage 3.
IPO doubles, viral brand rerating, and K-beauty/K-food crowding reduce runway quickly.
